title: uragoga xanthina
side_effects: Uragoga xanthina can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset due to its high levels of xanthine alkaloids. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to headaches, insomnia, and an increased heart rate. Overuse of Uragoga xanthina has been linked to kidney damage and liver strain, particularly in individuals with pre-existing health conditions. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, Uragoga xanthina can exacerbate conditions such as high blood pressure and anxiety disorders.
